meta.verifiedNote: PAGASA Bulletin No. 7 (11 AM, 09 Jul). Exact current + forecast coordinates.

current.name: INDAY
current.positionRef: 865 km E of Northern Luzon (inside PAR)
current.pressure: Not specified in latest bulletin reproduction (940 hPa at 5 AM)
current.outlook: Weakened to a typhoon; Signal No. 2 raised over Batanes. Moves NW over the Philippine Sea, closest to Extreme N. Luzon between Fri 10 Jul evening and Sat 11 Jul morning; near or over N. Taiwan; exits PAR Sat 11 Jul; China (Zhejiang) landfall Sun 12 Jul, weakening to a severe tropical storm inland. PH landfall unlikely.

marine.galeWarning: Gale Warning No. 3 in effect (5:00 AM) — northern & eastern seaboards of Luzon, and the eastern seaboard of Visayas.

waves.where: Seaboards of Batanes; N & E seaboards of Babuyan Is.; NE seaboard of mainland Cagayan
Remaining seaboards of Cagayan and Babuyan Is.; seaboard of Isabela
Aurora, Camarines Norte; N Camarines Sur; N & E Polillo Is. and Catanduanes; E Northern Samar; NE Eastern Samar

marine.advice: Sea travel is risky for all vessels in the affected seaboards. All mariners must remain in port or seek safe harbor until winds and waves subside.

satellite.note: Satellite imagery is visual context only; official center/track from PAGASA.
